question: You may use DANGEROUS placards instead of separate placards for each Table 2 hazard class when:
canonical_answer: you have 1,001 lbs or more of two or more table 2 hazard classes AND you have not loaded 2,205 lbs or more of any Table 2 hazard class materials at any one place
